Category.title: Category
Category.description: Tax FAQ categories (e.g., Individual Tax, Corporate Tax).

icon.description: The Lucide icon name for the category.

categoryId.description: The ID of the category this question belongs to.

answerBody.description: The official answer to the question.

isPublished.description: Whether the question is published and visible to the public.

viewCount.description: The number of times this question has been viewed.

createdAt.description: The date and time the question was created.

UserSubmission.title: UserSubmission
UserSubmission.description: Questions submitted by users for review.

userEmail.description: The email of the user who submitted the question.

questionText.description: The text of the submitted question.

status.description: The current status of the submission.

createdAt.description: The date and time the submission was created.
